codeReview.summary: The feature adds a substantial Evals family with CRUD, run, and output-item coverage, but it does not fully satisfy the advanced-platform contract. The run status model is wired to undocumented spellings, so real eval-run states from the official surface will deserialize to `Unknown`, and the feature never added the contract-required live eval-run/output-item smoke that proves the unusual cancel route and item inspection against the real API.

issues.description: `EvalRunStatus` recognizes and re-emits `running`, `succeeded`, and `cancelled`, but the official eval-run surface uses `in_progress`, `completed`, and `canceled` for run status/filtering (see `references/openai-node/src/resources/evals/runs/runs.ts:2824-2827`). Real run payloads using the documented values will therefore deserialize as `EvalRunStatus::Unknown(...)`, so callers lose the typed `status` semantics required by VAL-ADV-006/VAL-ADV-014. The mocked contract test reinforces the wrong wire contract by asserting `running`/`succeeded`/`cancelled` at `tests/eval_runs_contract.rs:16-31,265-267`.

The feature claims coverage for VAL-ADV-006 and VAL-ADV-007, but the commit only adds an eval CRUD live smoke. There is no live eval-run/output-item smoke in `tests/`, and the handoff records only `cargo test --test live_evals_crud_smoke -- --ignored --nocapture`. That leaves the contract's required real-API proof for eval-run creation/cancel semantics and output-item inspection unimplemented, so the milestone assertions are not fully satisfied.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The mission feature manifest under-specifies this feature's live-validation obligation. `features.json` lists only `live_evals_crud_smoke`, while `validation-contract.md` requires a live eval-run smoke for VAL-ADV-006 and says VAL-ADV-007 can piggyback on that single-item run. That mismatch likely contributed to the missing live run proof in the implementation.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `features.json:1751-1755` lists `cargo test --test evals_contract`, `cargo test --test eval_runs_contract`, `cargo test --test eval_output_items_contract`, and `set -a && . ./creds.txt && set +a && cargo test --test live_evals_crud_smoke -- --ignored --nocapture`; `validation-contract.md:529-536,570-573` instead calls for `cargo test --ignored live_eval_run_smoke -- --nocapture` to prove run cancel/output-item behavior.

summary: Reviewed the feature handoff, transcript skeleton, sdk-surface-worker procedure, and commit `bc75955`. The Evals family wiring and mocked coverage are substantial, but the review fails because eval-run statuses are modeled with the wrong wire values and the feature never implemented the contract-required live eval-run/output-item proof.
